title: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated to Present at the Barclays Global Financial Services Conference
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , Aug. 30, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (Nasdaq: HBAN) will present at the 2023 Barclays Global Financial Services Conference on Monday, September 11, 2023.  Zach Wasserman, chief financial officer, is scheduled to present to analysts and investors at 12:00 PM (Eastern Time).

title: Huntington Bancshares: 5 Reasons This Regional Bank Is A Strong Buy
text: Huntington Bancshares gets a strong buy rating today, more bullish than the consensus from analysts and the quant system. Positives: dividend yield vs sector average, valuation vs sector average, capital strength, share price vs 200-day SMA, earnings YoY growth. Risk of exposure to net charge-offs and bad assets was deemed not critical, as net charge-off ratio is on decline from peak.

title: JPMorgan, Goldman and Morgan Stanley win praise in Jefferies Q2 bank earnings wrap
text: Bank fundamentals were challenged but results were better than worst-case fears as higher interest rates boosted bank loan yields, Jefferies analyst Ken Usdin said Thursday in the firm's summary of second-quarter profits for the 36 large and mid-sized banks in its coverage universe.

title: Huntington Bank Names Marcy Hingst General Counsel
text: Jana Litsey to retire as Huntington's General Counsel in December COLUMBUS, Ohio, Aug. 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Huntington National Bank ("Huntington") announced today the appointment of Marcy Hingst as General Counsel. Hingst will join the bank's Executive Leadership Team and oversee all legal activities for the company.
